name: construction contractors processing 5–15 permits/month tool
description: For construction contractors processing 5–15 permits/month, complex submission processes cause delays in project timelines. We simplify the permit creation and submission instead of manual submission through local government websites.
problem_solved: Delays in permit approval due to complex submission processes.

locked_fields.current_alternative: manual submission through local government websites

one_liner: For construction contractors processing 5–15 permits/month, complex submission processes cause delays in project timelines. We simplify the permit creation and submission instead of manual submission through local government websites.
